Location: 14:34 - 16:2
Root: Effect.fail("error").pipe(\n  Effect.catch((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))\n)

      ==> [subject] -> [1]

      ~> [call] -> [2]

      ==> [pipeable] -> [3]
